query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_payouts, COUNT(DISTINCT dealId) as deals_with_payouts, SUM(netCommissionGbp) as total_gbp, SUM(netCommissionUsd) as total_usd, MIN(payoutYear) as earliest_year, MAX(payoutYear) as latest_year FROM commission_payouts;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_payouts, COUNT(DISTINCT dealId) as deals_with_payouts, SUM(netCommissionGbp) as total_gbp, SUM(netCommissionUsd) as total_usd, MIN(payoutYear) as earliest_year, MAX(payoutYear) as latest_year FROM commission_payouts;
